promptContext.title: Printer drops offline after router change
promptContext.description: The store printer reconnects briefly and then disappears after a weekend network change.

comments.content: The staff is not sure whether the issue is power, cable, or the router update.

providerSummary: Issue: The printer intermittently drops offline after a recent router change. Current: the ticket remains OPEN and the latest internal note says the root cause is still unclear. Next: confirm whether the issue is network or hardware before any operator attempts a targeted fix.
